requirement_topic.en: Belgian Elia/DSO Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 比利时Elia/配电运营商并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 比利時Elia/配電運營商併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Belgium are subject to Elia (transmission system operator) technical regulations for high-voltage connections and to regional DSO rules for low-voltage and medium-voltage connections: Fluvius (Flanders and Brussels Capital Region) and ORES/RESA (Wallonia). The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Belgium's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Belgium uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Belgium is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Belgian DSOs may also require commissioning documentation in Dutch (Fluvius) or French (ORES/RESA/BRUGEL) depending on the region.
summary.zh: 比利时并网太阳能光伏逆变器受Elia（输电系统运营商）高压接入技术法规及区域配电运营商低压和中压接入规则的约束：弗兰德和布鲁塞尔首都大区由Fluvius负责，瓦隆由ORES/RESA负责。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对比利时230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。比利时与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：比利时为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。比利时配电运营商还可能要求根据所在地区以荷语（Fluvius）或法语（ORES/RESA/BRUGEL）提交调试文件。
summary.zht: 比利時併網太陽能光伏逆變器受Elia（輸電系統運營商）高壓接入技術法規及區域配電運營商低壓和中壓接入規則的約束：法蘭德斯和布魯塞爾首都大區由Fluvius負責，瓦隆由ORES/RESA負責。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對比利時230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。比利時與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：比利時為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。比利時配電運營商還可能要求根據所在地區以荷語（Fluvius）或法語（ORES/RESA/BRUGEL）提交調試文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Elia technical regulations for connection to the high-voltage grid (C10/11 and related technical codes)
Fluvius grid-connection technical rules (Flanders / Brussels Capital Region)
Belgium low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Belgium's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to Elia, Fluvius, ORES/RESA, or BRUGEL project acceptance in Belgium.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非比利时50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为Elia、Fluvius、ORES/RESA或BRUGEL项目验收证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非比利時50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為Elia、Fluvius、ORES/RESA或BRUGEL項目驗收證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Belgian Elia/DSO project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Belgium-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Belgium voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For projects connected to Fluvius (Flanders/Brussels) or ORES/RESA (Wallonia), commissioning and project documentation may be required in Dutch or French respectively. Elia C10/11 applies to higher-voltage connections. EU RfG 2016/631 applies above member-state thresholds.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代比利时Elia/配电运营商项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、比利时专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称比利时电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。接入Fluvius（弗兰德/布鲁塞尔）或ORES/RESA（瓦隆）的项目，调试和项目文件可能分别须以荷语或法语提交。Elia C10/11适用于较高电压接入。欧盟RfG 2016/631适用于超过成员国规定阈值的发电装置。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代比利時Elia/配電運營商項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、比利時專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱比利時電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。接入Fluvius（法蘭德斯/布魯塞爾）或ORES/RESA（瓦隆）的項目，調試和項目文件可能分別須以荷語或法語提交。Elia C10/11適用於較高電壓接入。歐盟RfG 2016/631適用於超過成員國規定閾值的發電裝置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through Elia technical review (high-voltage) and Fluvius/ORES/RESA/BRUGEL DSO project acceptance (low-voltage and medium-voltage); EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding above member-state thresholds
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a Belgian Elia or DSO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Belgium 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Belgian Elia or DSO (Fluvius/ORES/RESA) grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Belgium's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and document the applicable Elia and regional DSO requirements. Dutch-language documentation is typically required for Fluvius connections; French-language documentation for ORES/RESA connections. Verify current Elia C10/11, Fluvius, ORES/RESA, and CREG project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足比利时Elia或配电运营商（Fluvius/ORES/RESA）并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为比利时230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并记录适用的Elia和区域配电运营商要求。Fluvius接入通常要求荷语文件；ORES/RESA接入要求法语文件。出货或调试前请直接核实现行Elia C10/11、Fluvius、ORES/RESA和CREG项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足比利時Elia或配電運營商（Fluvius/ORES/RESA）併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為比利時230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並記錄適用的Elia和區域配電運營商要求。Fluvius接入通常要求荷語文件；ORES/RESA接入要求法語文件。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行Elia C10/11、Fluvius、ORES/RESA和CREG項目要求。
